source: Premier Sport Awards category 11 + JDS API
title: Soccer Resin Trophies

products.title: 7" Soccer Astro Award
products.description: A soccer ball sits on a 3 1/2" column adorned with a star and draped ribbon. The shield shaped base offers plenty of room for a personalized plate to complete the award. This is the smallest of 3 available sizes to fill the award needs of any budget!

products.title: 8 3/4" Soccer Astro Award
products.description: A soccer ball sits on a 5 1/8" column adorned with a star and draped ribbon. The shield shaped base offers plenty of room for a personalized plate to complete the award. This is the mid-size of 3 available sizes to fill the award needs of any budget!

products.title: 10 3/4" Soccer Astro Award
products.description: A soccer ball sits on a 7 1/4" column adorned with a star and draped ribbon. The shield shaped base offers plenty of room for a personalized plate to complete the award. This is the largest of 3 available sizes to fill the award needs of any budget!

products.title: 6" Soccer Aspire Resin
products.description: The sport ball on the Aspire resin sits on top of a riser with silver and gold banners and a star design, and the base offers plenty of room for a sublimated or engraved plate. Budget friendly but still impressive, each resin is individually boxed. Just add your plate and they're ready to go!

products.title: 8" Soccer Aspire Resin
products.description: The sport ball on the Aspire resin sits on top of a riser with silver and gold banners and a star design, and the base offers plenty of room for a sublimated or engraved plate. Budget friendly but still impressive, each resin is individually boxed. Just add your plate and they're ready to go!

products.title: 6" Soccer Broadcast Resin
products.description: Broadcast Resins are individually boxed and the plates are not included. They are an Antique Gold/Black resin that comes in 2 different sizes and 9 different styles including a 2 inch insert holder. Resins are a great alternative to building a trophy!

products.title: 7" Soccer Broadcast Resin
products.description: Broadcast Resins are individually boxed and the plates are not included. They are an Antique Gold/Black resin that comes in 2 different sizes and 9 different styles including a 2 inch insert holder. Resins are a great alternative to building a trophy!

products.title: 7" Soccer Banner Resin
products.description: JDS Banner Resins are individually boxed and the plates are not included. They are a full color, Bright Silver and Gold resin that comes in 2 different sizes and 9 different styles. Resins are a great alternative to building a trophy!

products.title: 8 1/2" Soccer Banner Resin
products.description: JDS Banner Resins are individually boxed and the plates are not included. They are a full color, Bright Silver and Gold resin that comes in 2 different sizes and 9 different styles. Resins are a great alternative to building a trophy!

products.title: 7" Soccer Blaze Award
products.description: Blaze Award -7" Soccer Award. Back of the award is plain. Material: Plastic. Color: Gold. Weighted plastic awards are individually boxed.

products.title: 7 1/2" Soccer Champion Award
products.description: Champion Award - 7 1/2" Soccer Award. Base does not have a ferrule for mounting. The front looks just like the back. Material: Plastic. Color: Antique Gold. Weighted plastic awards are individually boxed.

products.title: 8 1/2" Soccer Champion Award
products.description: Champion Award - 8 1/2" Soccer Award. Base does not have a ferrule for mounting. The front looks just like the back. Material: Plastic. Color: Antique Gold. Weighted plastic awards are individually boxed.

products.title: 10" Soccer Champion Award
products.description: Champion Award - 10" Soccer Award. Base does not have a ferrule for mounting. The front looks just like the back. Material: Plastic. Color: Antique Gold. Weighted plastic awards are individually boxed.

products.title: 6 1/2" Soccer Cobra Award
products.description: The 6 1/2" Soccer Cobra Award is made of weighted Plastic. The gold/antiquegold award has a rounded back with the "hood" detail around the ball. Just add a plate to this award and it's ready to go! All weighted plastic awards are individually boxed.

products.title: 7 1/2" Soccer Cobra Award
products.description: Cobra Award - 7 1/2" Soccer Award. Material: Plastic. Color: Antique Gold. The back is rounded with the "hood" detail around it. Weighted plastic awards are individually boxed.

products.title: 9" Soccer Cobra Award
products.description: Cobra Award - 9" Soccer Award. Material: Plastic. Color: Antique Gold. The back is rounded with the "hood" detail around it. Weighted plastic awards are individually boxed.

products.title: 10 1/2" Soccer Cobra Award
products.description: Cobra Award - 10 1/2" Soccer Award. Material: Plastic. Color: Antique Gold. The back is rounded with the "hood" detail around it. Weighted plastic awards are individually boxed.

products.title: 12" Soccer Cobra Award
products.description: Cobra Award - 12" Soccer Award. Material: Plastic. Color: Antique Gold. The back is rounded with the "hood" detail around it. Weighted plastic awards are individually boxed.

products.title: 5 1/2" Soccer Embrace Resin
products.description: The Soccer Embrace resin in antique silver and gold features a 2" soccer Ball "embraced" by ribbons of silver and gold. The engraving area on the base has room for a nice sized plate for personalization. This resin is also available in a 6 1/2" size. Very little labor involved, just add your plate and it's ready to go. Each resin is individually boxed.

products.title: 6 1/2" Soccer Embrace Resin
products.description: The Soccer Embrace resin in antique silver and gold features a 2 1/2" soccer ball "embraced" by ribbons of silver and gold. The engraving area on the base will hold a nice sized plate for personalization. This resin is also available in a 5 1/2" size. Very little labor involved, just add your plate and it's ready to go. Each resin is individually boxed.

products.title: 7 1/2" Soccer Hurricane Award
products.description: Hurricane Award - 7 1/2" Soccer Award. Weighted plastic awards are individually boxed. Color: Gold/Silver.

products.title: 5 1/2" Soccer Jazz Star Resin
products.description: Jazz Star Resins are individually boxed and the plates are not included. They are full color, Antique Silver/Gold that are 5 ½ inches with 14 different styles including a 2 inch insert holder. Resins are a great alternative to building a trophy!

products.title: 5" Soccer Little Pal Resin
products.description: JDS Little Pals Resins are individually boxed and the plates are not included. They are a full color resin that are 5 inches. They come in 10 different styles. Resins are a great alternative to building a trophy!

products.title: 6" Soccer Imperial Resin
products.description: Imperial resin awards are available in 3 sizes for 4 sports, as well as a 6" tall 2" insert holder award. The sport balls sit on a pedestal of gold beams that give them an "imperial" look. There is no assembly involved, simply add a personalized plate to the base and they're ready to go! These awards give you an impressive look at a pricepoint to fit any budget making themideal for large tournaments where a number of players are awarded.

products.title: 7 7/8" Soccer Imperial Resin
products.description: Imperial resin awards are available in 3 sizes for 4 sports, as well as a 6" tall 2" insert holder award. The sport balls sit on a pedestal of gold beams that give them an "imperial" look. There is no assembly involved, simply add a personalized plate to the base and they're ready to go! These awards give you an impressive look at a pricepoint to fit any budget making themideal for large tournaments where a number of players are awarded.

products.description: JDS Encore Resins are individually boxed and the plates are not included. They are a full color resin, Antique Gold and Silver resin that comes in 3 different sizes and 6 different styles including a 2 inch insert holder. Resins are a great alternative to building a trophy!

products.description: JDS Encore Resins are individually boxed and the plates are not included. They are a full color resin, Antique Gold and Silver resin that comes in 3 different sizes and 6 different styles including a 2 inch insert holder. Resins are a great alternative to building a trophy!

products.description: Rock Star Resin- 9" Soccer award. Material is Plastic. Back of Resin is flat. Color is Antique Gold.

products.description: Ribbon Resins are individually boxed and the plates are not included. They are a full color resin that comes in 2 different sizes and 6 styles- Baseball, Basketball, Football, Soccer, Softball and 2 inch insert holder. Resins are a great alternative to building a trophy!

products.description: Ribbon Resins are individually boxed and the plates are not included. They are a full color resin that comes in 2 different sizes and 6 styles- Baseball, Basketball, Football, Soccer, Softball and 2 inch insert holder. Resins are a great alternative to building a trophy!

products.title: 6" Soccer Shield Award
products.description: Shield Award - 6" Soccer Award. Color: Silver/Gold. The back features a pattern of trophy cups. Weighted plastic awards are individually boxed.

products.description: Shield Award - 7" Soccer Award. Color: Silver/Gold. The back features a pattern of trophy cups. Weighted plastic awards are individually boxed.

products.description: Sun Ray Award - 8" Soccer Award. Color: Gold/Gray/Silver. Weighted plastic awards are individually boxed.

products.title: 5 1/2" Soccer Triad Resin
products.description: Triad Resin - 5 1/2" Soccer Award. Color: Antique Gold/Silver. Resin is flat on the back. Individually boxed. Plate not included. Maximum plate size : 2 1/2" x 1 1/16".

products.title: 5 1/2" Soccer Triumph Resin
products.description: Triumph resin awards are available in 2 sizes for 16 sports and a 2" insertholder. Silver with gold accents and stars, each resin features items that represent the sport it's intended for. Resins are a great award for any budget and there is very little labor involved, just add a personalized plate and they're ready to go!

products.description: Tri Star Resin - 5 1/2" Soccer. Color: Gold/Black/White. Individually boxed. Plates not included.
